mission: Give Buddy a governed genealogy, people-search, background-check intake, phone-number history, and job-qualification lookup system for recruiting, client discovery, contractor matching, partner research, ancestry reporting, and workforce planning.

allowed_sources: public license or certification registries when allowed
public court records when legally accessible
public phone-carrier availability tools that do not expose private subscriber data
blocked_sources: scraped personal data that violates terms
carrier account records without account-owner authorization
consumer reports without a compliant FCRA provider and permissible purpose

qualification_lanes.label: Genealogy Report
qualification_lanes.purpose: Build family-history packets from self-provided documents and public archival sources with source citations, confidence notes, and unknowns clearly marked.

qualification_lanes.label: Consent-Based People Search
qualification_lanes.purpose: Prepare a public-source or user-authorized lookup packet for reconnecting, vendor due diligence, partnership research, or contact hygiene without private-data scraping.

qualification_lanes.label: Background Check Intake
qualification_lanes.purpose: Collect the checklist, consent status, permissible purpose, and provider handoff data needed before any lawful background check can run.

qualification_lanes.label: Phone Number Recovery
qualification_lanes.purpose: Help a user document old numbers, account ownership, carrier contacts, and lawful reuse steps without accessing private subscriber data or tracking people.

qualification_lanes.label: Candidate Resume Match
qualification_lanes.purpose: Compare self-provided resumes or application materials against a job description using role requirements and evidence notes.

qualification_lanes.label: Contractor and Vendor Match
qualification_lanes.purpose: Research public contractor/vendor profiles, portfolios, capabilities, reviews, and fit for a project.

qualification_lanes.label: Sales People Research
qualification_lanes.purpose: Prepare compliant lead or stakeholder research from public and approved sources for owner-reviewed outreach.

qualification_lanes.label: Employee Role Fit
qualification_lanes.purpose: Prepare role-fit notes, training needs, onboarding plans, and interview prompts without making automated hiring decisions.

qualification_lanes.label: License and Certification Checklist
qualification_lanes.purpose: Prepare a checklist for licenses, certifications, permits, and evidence that a human must verify against allowed sources.

qualification_lanes.label: Relocation Workforce Match
qualification_lanes.purpose: Research local talent pools, workforce availability, training programs, and hiring channels for business relocation or expansion.
